2 Days / 6 Dives

Become a certified advanced diver with Deep Specialty in Discounted price.

What you learn in this course?

• Make use of a compass for navigation.

• Improve your bouyancy.

• Exploration below 18 meters/60 feet.

• Manage your air supply

• Emergency procedures for deep diving and first aid

Inclusions

• Basic set of Equipment

• Learning Materials

• Lunch & Drinks

content.rendered:
RESCUE DIVER & EMERGENCY FIRST RESPONSE

2 Days / 5 Dives

The Rescue Diver Course will take you on a journey of adventure and safety. Gain the confidence and skills to become the diver everyone trusts, capable of handling dive emergencies and providing critical first aid.

Develop the skills and confidence to save someone’s life.

You will be able to help someone going into cardiac arrest by performing traditional or hands-only CPR or using an AED (Automatic External Defibrillator) once you have finished the Emergency First Response CPR & AED course.

What you learn in this course?

• First Aiding

• Use an emergency oxygen kit

 

Inclusions

• Basic set of Equipment

• Learning Materials

• Lunch & Drinks

• Boat

• Instructor Service

EQUIPMENT SPECIALIST COURSE

1 DAY

This course will provide an in-depth look at how dive equipment works. It will cover general repairs and maintenance on a variety of wet suits, BCDs, regulators, and other equipment.

What you learn in this course?

• Clean and maintain your gear

• Fix equipment problems

content.rendered:
DEEP DIVER & NITROX DIVER SPECIALTY

2 DAYS / 4 DIVES

The Deep Diver Specialty equips divers with the skills and knowledge to safely explore greater depths, typically between 18-40 meters (60-130 feet). The course focuses on deep diving techniques, gas management, navigation, and handling potential challenges like nitrogen narcosis and limited light. Ideal for those seeking adventure beyond recreational limits, it opens up access to deeper reefs, wrecks, and unique marine life.

Dive longer and safer with Nitrox certification, the preferred gas for discerning divers. You can enhance your dives with gas mixtures by learning how to safely utilize Nitrox’s advantages in the Nitrox course.

What you learn in this course?

• Manage your air supply

• Emergency procedures for deep diving and first aid

• Utilize an oxygen air analyzer.

• Dive with nitrox.

• Set your dive computer.

Inclusions

• Basic set of Equipment

• Learning Materials and Certification

• Lunch & Drinks

• Boat

• Instructor Service

content.rendered:
WRECK DIVER and nitrox SPECIALTY

2 DAYS / 4 DIVES

The Wreck Diving Specialty is an exciting scuba diving course that trains divers to safely explore underwater shipwrecks and other submerged structures. It covers essential skills such as wreck navigation, assessing structural integrity, and handling potential hazards like entanglement or silt-outs. Divers also learn techniques for responsible exploration, ensuring the preservation of these historical sites. Ideal for adventure-seekers, this specialty opens up a world of underwater history and mystery.

Dive longer and safer with Nitrox certification, the preferred gas for discerning divers. You can enhance your dives with gas mixtures by learning how to safely utilize Nitrox’s advantages in the Nitrox course.

What you learn in this course?

• Proper use of lines and reels

• Mapping wrecks

• Analyzing nitrox tank

• Utilize an oxygen air analyzer.

• Dive with nitrox.

• Set your dive computer.

 

Inclusion

• Basic set of Equipment

• Learning Materials and Certification

• Lunch & Drinks

• Boat

• Instructor Service
